blockr.ai 0.0.1
  • Reference

LLM system prompts

Source: R/block-data.R, R/block-flxtbl.R, R/block-gt.R, and 4 more
system_prompt.Rd

System prompts for instructing the LLM to return code using certain packages, adhering to certain styles, etc. are created per LLM block class and a corresponding S3 generic is available as system_prompt(), which is dispatched on LLM block proxy objects.

# S3 method for class 'llm_data_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, ...)

# S3 method for class 'llm_flxtbl_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, ...)

# S3 method for class 'llm_gt_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, ...)

# S3 method for class 'llm_insights_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, tools, ...)

# S3 method for class 'llm_plot_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, ...)

# S3 method for class 'llm_transform_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, ...)

system_prompt(x, ...)

# Default S3 method
system_prompt(x, datasets, tools, ...)

# S3 method for class 'llm_block_proxy'
system_prompt(x, datasets, tools, ...)

describe_inputs(x)

describe_input(x, ...)

# S3 method for class 'flextable'
describe_input(x, ...)

# Default S3 method
describe_input(x, ...)

Arguments

x

LLM block proxy object

datasets

Data sets from which to extract metadata

...

Generic consistency

tools

List of ellmer::tool() objects

Value

A string.

Contents

Developed by Nicolas Bennett, Antoine Fabri, Christoph Sax.
